prompt: A traditional Chinese ink wash landscape painting featuring a giant mecha integrated into the misty mountains. The mecha, resembling Evangelion Unit-01, features a purple and green color scheme with a prominent horn and the number "01" on its shoulder. Its massive form dissolves into expressive, dripping black ink washes, seamlessly blending into the rocky mountain formations. The surrounding landscape includes steep, jagged peaks painted with teal and green washes, cascading waterfalls, ancient pine trees, and small traditional pavilions perched on the cliffs. A flock of birds flies through the dense fog filling the valleys. In the top left corner, vertical traditional Chinese calligraphy reads 初號機 followed by 人之造物 亦為山水, accompanied by a red artist seal stamp. Another red seal is stamped in the bottom right corner. The entire artwork is rendered on textured, aged rice paper, utilizing dynamic brushstrokes and atmospheric perspective typical of classical Shan shui art.
